metadata.name: Provide Body Shop Estimate for Collision Repair

description: A customer has been in a minor accident and needs an estimate for the body repair work.

nodes.task_description: Schedule an appointment for the customer to bring their vehicle in for an estimate.
During the visit, an estimator assesses the damage and identifies the parts and labor required.

expected_outcome.value: The estimator documents the needed repairs.

nodes.task_description: Generate a detailed, itemized estimate for the customer and their insurance company.

expected_outcome.value: A formal estimate is created and provided to the customer.
